goals.title: Ponytail principles refactor for GT_PJT. Deliverable: install/enable...
goals.objective: Ponytail principles refactor for GT_PJT. Deliverable: install/enable Ponytail plugin if CLI supports it, then complete a first-wave low-risk behavior-preserving refactor in this repository. Constraints: preserve behavior; no new dependencies; do not revert user changes; avoid dirty files unless unavoidable; frontend/backend/llm_server should not be broadly rewritten at once; security/auth/data-loss/accessibility/test stability must not be weakened; use existing helpers and stdlib first. Success criteria: C1 install evidence: Ponytail marketplace/plugin setup command result is captured, or the exact blocker and next UI step is captured. C2 planning evidence: repo survey classifies refactor candidates by impact/risk and selects only low-risk first-wave scope. C3 behavior evidence: before/after characterization or existing tests prove behavior preserved for touched code. C4 verification evidence: targeted tests for touched area pass; available broader commands are attempted or blockers captured exactly. C5 final review evidence: diff is reviewed for Ponytail principles, no user changes reverted, cleanup receipts recorded.

adversarialCases.scenario: Invalid timeline enum-like values are normalized to fallbacks.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: Unsupported values fall back without changing response shape.
Endpoint returns the original parsed roadmap result.

adversarialCases.scenario: Repository starts with unrelated dirty user files.
adversarialCases.expectedBehavior: First-wave refactor leaves unrelated dirty files unreverted.

artifactRefs.description: Programming checker and test verification evidence.
Scope, dirty-file, and Ponytail diff review evidence.
Manual QA matrix with current-state artifact references.

gateReview.evidence: Final gate approved after direct programming checker, tests, code review, manual QA, and artifact non-empty checks.

iteration.evidence: Focused and broader verification reran cleanly after programming-check cleanup.

criteriaCoverage.originalIntent: Install Ponytail and complete a Ponytail-first, low-risk first-wave behavior-preserving refactor without broad rewrites or new dependencies.
criteriaCoverage.desiredOutcome: Scoped LLM roadmap-processing refactor is easier to maintain, keeps behavior stable, preserves user changes, and has artifact-backed verification.
criteriaCoverage.userOutcomeReview: Ponytail was installed, LLM server helpers were split by responsibility, all requested test surfaces passed, and final review/QA/gate artifacts approve the current state.
